name: Jewel Match Dracula Collector's Edition
short_description: Sink your teeth into a gothic Match-3 adventure in this ghoulish new installment of the Jewel Match series. As a powerful vampire lord, tackle eerie match-3 puzzles to resurrect and refurbish the legendary Castle Dracula.
detailed_description:
Sink your teeth into a gothic Match-3 adventure in this ghoulish new installment of the Jewel Match series.

As a powerful vampire lord, you'll tackle eerie match-3 puzzles to resurrect and refurbish the legendary Castle Dracula. Use mystical gem magic to unveil new castle elements, transforming dilapidated ruins into a grand fortress worthy of the Prince of Darkness himself. Venture through vast levels filled with mysterious treasures awaiting discovery.

Engage in bonus mini-games, including hidden object scenes and puzzles, to gather resources for your sinister quest. Peruse an extensive collection of ghastly power-ups available in the nocturnal store.

Will you become the master architect of perpetual darkness, constructing the most feared castle in the realm? A thrilling journey into shadow beckons, dark lord. Carve your legacy into the realm of eternal night in this unique Match-3 experience.

  • Traverse 150 vast chambers of Castle Dracula!

  • Venture through 40 additional cryptic levels, unveiling new challenges!

  • Choose from three unique game modes: Timed, Relaxed and Limited Moves!

  • Tailor your sinister quest with three difficulty levels: Normal, Advanced and Extreme.

  • Resurrect a majestic gothic fortress, designing its shadowy halls and secret passages.

  • Enhance your vampiric powers by purchasing various upgrades and powerful boosts in the in-game store.

  • Indulge in replayable mini-games featuring bewitching puzzles and captivating 'spot the difference' challenges.

  • Unlock haunting wallpapers for your desktop.
